assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_015",
  "rule_id": "Ensure PAM Enforces Password Requirements - Minimum Digit Characters",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.96,
  "rationale": "Password digit requirement rule can be safely adjusted via pwquality.conf without risking system lockout.",
  "risk_factors": [],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Edit /etc/security/pwquality.conf or files in /etc/security/pwquality.conf.d/ to set dcredit to a positive value to enforce minimum digit count.",
    "Validate the change with 'pam_testers' or test login to ensure access is not blocked.",
    "Apply the modification across all relevant configuration files and verify with 'grep dcredit'."
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": true,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": false
}
